shortDescription: "Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Service Selection Commission (UPSSSC) has officially announced the UPSSSC Junior Engineer JE 2017 Exam Syllabus recruitment 2026 notification. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online for this ssc government job through the official portal. The online registration window for UPSSSC Junior Engineer JE 2017 Exam Syllabus opens on 27/12/2016 and closes on 17/01/20"
---

Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Service Selection Commission (UPSSSC) has released an official notification for Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Service Selection Commission (UPSSSC). 
The last date to apply is **17/01/2017**.
